steps.title: Factor the common binomial
steps.content: Notice that both terms contain the factor $(t+7)$. Factor it out: $$6(t+7)-8(t+7) = (6-8)(t+7)$$ $$= -2(t+7)$$ Set equal to 38: $$-2(t+7)=38$$

steps.title: Solve for t
steps.content: Divide both sides by $-2$: $$t+7 = \frac{38}{-2} = -19$$ Subtract 7 from both sides: $$t = -19 - 7 = -26$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
